title: antirrhinum hederaceum
intro: Antirrhinum hederaceum, also known as the Hairy Snapdragon or Creeping Snapdragon, is a low-growing, evergreen perennial plant in the Snapdragon family native to the Mediterranean region. It has medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and stems, which are used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, coughs, and colds, due to its antispasmodic and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Antirrhinum hederaceum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and help in respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as dried and used in poultices to treat skin conditions and wounds.
